podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: How to create viral founder led content #socialmediagrowth #businessrescue
podcasts.transcript: Do you have any really interesting stories that you think would create emotion? Because we need to create emotion to create action. Is there anything that comes to mind about your history with pasta or this restaurant as a whole? >> I don't think I'm too different in that sense. I've just always wanted to do something in the hills. I Yeah, lived here my whole life. >> The lesson that I'll give you there is everyone is unique. Everyone has something really interesting and it doesn't need to be some miraculous thing happen, a meteor came from the sky. It just needs to be told well because everyone has something unique in their life that if told well can have a powerful moment. So what I tell people to do when trying to come up with a story to tell on social media, it needs to be in the last 7 days. So something needs to have happened in the last 7 days, doesn't matter how small, and you need to spin that into an awesome story. Obviously I came in here wanting a colored pasta. I don't want to delve your business, so let's just tell that story. I think that will work. Sounds good. Found the stories are one of the best ways to get started on social media. They connect in such a genuine way, and best of all, they're so free. All you need to do is just film yourself telling your story. In a very succinct way, tell me the story about how if you keep trading the current way, what's going to happen to your dream. >> If things continue how they are and they don't grow considerably, I don't think we'll be able to fund our dream for longer [music] than the next 12 months. >> So we've got the talking part of the video. Now all we need to do is just get some shots of you making pasta so you can overlay it on your face to keep people interested in the video. All you're trying to do is shoot from different angles. So you could easily shoot from here, your hands free. Now that's B-roll. And it's not getting in the way of you having to do your regular job. >> Yeah. >> That looks great. That was super satisfying. So for this angle we could get a little tripod, or we can just use a little stand like this. >> I have such a strange job. >> Should we try it with some meat? >> Yeah, I can get some pork. >> Yeah, let's try it. Oh damn. That looks good. >> Beautiful. Smells so good. >> Yeah. >> What do you think it's not going to work? What do you think going to work? >> I think people will like the dishes. I just I don't know how much reach they will get organically. >> Well, here's the good thing is that they only need to get 10,000, 20,000 views. It doesn't need to get 10 million views, >> [music] >> and I think we're going to achieve that with the content we shot today.
